title: lora_l2.c:920 k_mutex_init return value logged but not acted upon
description: Contract violation: lichen_lora_l2_deinit() - Lines 920-926 and 931-935 log errors from k_mutex_init() but continue without returning error. If mutex init fails, subsequent operations will use corrupted mutex. WHY: Module left in unstable state. HOW to fix: Return -EIO after k_mutex_init failure, or document that best-effort recovery proceeds despite mutex init failure.
